scripts.dev:local:backend: DATABASE_URL=postgres://chatview:chatview@localhost:5432/chatview AUTO_MIGRATION=true DB_POOL_MAX=5 AGENT_TOKEN=dev-token bun run --hot apps/backend/server.ts
scripts.dev:local:agent: BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:3737 AGENT_TOKEN=dev-token AGENT_STATE=.chatview-agent-dev/state.json bun run apps/agent/main.ts run
scripts.dev:local:agent:scan: BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:3737 AGENT_TOKEN=dev-token AGENT_STATE=.chatview-agent-dev/state.json bun run apps/agent/main.ts scan-once
scripts.build:agent: mkdir -p dist && bun build apps/agent/main.ts --compile --outfile dist/chatview-agent
